类的使用
bupt.ta.model.User

  • 使用User的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    bupt.ta.service  
    bupt.ta.storage  

    • bupt.ta.service中User的使用

      返回User的bupt.ta.service中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      User AdminService.UserListRow.getUser() 
      User AdminService.TADetailReport.getUser() 
      User AdminService.MODetailReport.getUser() 
      参数类型为User的bupt.ta.service中的构造器 
      构造器和说明
      MODetailReport(User user, java.util.List<AdminService.MOJobDetailRow> jobRows, java.util.List<AdminService.AdminApplicationRow> applicationRows, int totalJobs, int activeJobs, int inactiveJobs, int totalApplications, int distinctApplicants, int pendingCount, int interviewCount, int waitlistCount, int selectedCount, int rejectedCount, int withdrawnCount, int autoClosedCount) 
      TADetailReport(User user, TAProfile profile, java.util.List<AdminService.AdminApplicationRow> applicationRows, java.util.List<Job> savedJobs, java.util.List<SiteNotification> notifications, int selectedCount, int pendingCount, int interviewCount, int waitlistCount, int rejectedCount, int autoClosedCount, int withdrawnCount) 
      UserListRow(User user, TAProfile profile, int selectedCount, int pendingCount, int interviewCount, int waitlistCount, int autoClosedCount, int unreadNotificationCount, int savedJobsCount, int postedJobsCount, int activeJobsCount, int totalApplicationsReceived, int totalSelectedForMo) 

    • bupt.ta.storage中User的使用

      返回User的bupt.ta.storage中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      User DataStorage.addUser(User user)
      Assigns a new id and appends a user.
      User DataStorage.findByEmail(java.lang.String email)
      Returns the user with the given email (case-insensitive), or null.
      User DataStorage.findByUsername(java.lang.String username)
      Returns the user with the given username, or null.
      User DataStorage.findUserById(java.lang.String id)
      Returns the user with the given id, or null.
      User DataStorage.validateRememberMeToken(java.lang.String rawToken)
      Resolves a remember-me token to a user, or null if invalid or expired.
      返回变量类型为User的类型的bupt.ta.storage中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.util.List<User> DataStorage.loadUsers()
      Loads all users from users.json.
      参数类型为User的bupt.ta.storage中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      User DataStorage.addUser(User user)
      Assigns a new id and appends a user.
      void DataStorage.saveUser(User user)
      Inserts or replaces a user by id.
